# DeployMate

> QA-driven release & compliance operations for 20-150 person SaaS teams. Turn chaotic release pipelines into audit-ready, boringly reliable machines. SOC2, ISO 27001, SOX, GDPR, NIS2 ready.

DeployMate is a fractional Release & Compliance Operations service for SaaS engineering teams. Founder-led by a CET-based engineer working async with EU and US East Coast teams. Three engagement tiers: 2-week Release Audit (€6,500), monthly Pipeline Architecture retainer (€6,000/mo, 10 hrs/week), and Release Systems Architecture (€10,000/mo, 20 hrs/week). Platform-agnostic: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Bitbucket Pipelines, CircleCI, Jenkins, TeamCity, Buildkite. No people management, no culture work — pipelines and compliance evidence only.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Service overview, pain points, audience, packages, process, credibility, FAQ, contact.
